Our History

Discover the roots of Evolution Hub Coworking and our purpose in the heart of Porto Maravilha.

Inaugurated on the vibrant Avenida Venezuela, in the heart of Porto Maravilha (RJ), Evolution Hub Coworking was born with a clear mission: to be the main meeting point for technology companies and IT professionals in Rio de Janeiro.

Since our foundation, our goal goes beyond providing a workspace. As highlighted by the project creator, Marcelo Telles: “The goal of Evolution Coworking is to create an environment that not only meets work needs, but also drives innovation and connection between talents and opportunities”.

More than a space, an Innovation Hub

Evolution Hub acts as a true growth catalyst. Designed and structured to promote collaboration and creativity, we also function as a business accelerator. Here, we connect high-potential startups to angel investors, offering continuous support in development and hard negotiations.

Our agenda is alive and community-focused. We host regular lectures, immersive practical workshops, and complete mentoring programs for industry professionals.

Global Connections

The project celebrated its opening bringing together industry leaders, entrepreneurs, investors, and international figures, such as the Consul of Panama and representatives of the prestigious Coalizão Rio Institute. Looking to the future, we seek to establish direct agreements with the governments of various countries, fostering exchanges and collaborative work to expand our members' opportunities on a global scale.

The information detailing our foundation was originally published in the report "Porto Maravilha receives technology and innovation hub", by the Conexão Fluminense portal.
